utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan:
- health_coverage: Present with costs (€100 + €65, total €165). Fully specified with type (physical and mental) and costs. Included.
- property_coverage: Present with costs (€95 + €45, total €140). Included.
- travel_coverage: Present with cost (€110/month) and mentions optional concierge ~€100/day (~€300/month). Costs are included; baseline and optional noted. Included.
- additional_services: Present with cost (€20/month) and description. Included.
- total_budget: Present with a breakdown and baseline monthly total (€435) plus note on optional concierge usage impact. Included.
All 5 items appear and include costs; details are sufficiently specified per item.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific items: LifeFirst Standard Plan – Physical Health and LifeFirst Standard Plan – Mental Health; EliteHome Premium Coverage and Smart Home Integration add-on; EliteTravel Premium Plan; Premium Insurance Membership. I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings. For Smart Home Integration and Premium Insurance Membership, I used the ratings from the property_enhancement_services and general_services sections respectively.

final_package_text:
{
  "health_coverage": "LifeFirst Standard Plan – Physical Health at €100/month and LifeFirst Standard Plan – Mental Health at €65/month (Total: €165/month). This ensures comprehensive coverage with 24/7 support and specialized family therapy.",
  "property_coverage": "EliteHome Premium Coverage at €95/month plus Smart Home Integration add-on at €45/month (Total: €140/month). This provides robust coverage for high-value assets and modern home security enhancements.",
  "travel_coverage": "EliteTravel Premium Plan at €110/month providing 24/7 global travel assistance, emergency evacuation, and adaptations for high-risk scenarios. Additionally, optional Concierge Services for travel enhancement at approximately €100/day, estimated at around €300/month when activated on key travel days (baseline cost remains €110/month).",
  "additional_services": "Premium Insurance Membership at €20/month offering a 15% discount on all policies with dedicated advisory support. Optional concierge services can be used as needed for high-end travel days.",
  "total_budget": "Baseline monthly total is approximately €435/month (Health: €165, Property: €140, Travel: €110, Enhancements: €20). With activation of optional concierge services, the cost may increase depending on usage, yet it remains significantly lower than the current expenditure of €985/month."
}
